issues.description: Action type is 'TrashFromHand' but effect text says 'Trash 3 cards from the top of your deck' — should be 'TrashFromDeck' or equivalent deck-trashing action, not hand-trashing

Action type is 'GiveKeyword' with 'Unblockable', but effect text says 'can also attack active Characters' — this grants ability to attack active Characters (ignoring rest status), not Unblockable. Should use a different keyword or custom action representing 'CanAttackActive' or similar
Target scope is 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' with no filter for {Navy} type — condition must specify 'HasType' filter for Navy, and should be limited to 'Up to 1' via count constraint
Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but text says 'during this turn' — should be 'DuringYourTurn' to reflect the scope of the current attack turn
